description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup-style design with a distinctive, stylized exterior. The body is decorated with a colorful, cartoon-like urban warehouse motif, including depictions of crates, boxes, and brickwork, giving it a playful yet detailed appearance. The upper receiver and barrel shroud are rendered in a light blue color, contrasting with the tan and brown tones of the lower receiver and grip area. The magazine is integrated into the rear section, typical of bullpup rifles, and the barrel protrudes slightly from the front with a black muzzle device. The rifle has a prominent trigger guard and a unique, rounded grip area, with no visible external attachments such as scopes or rails. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with hard, defined edges and a visually striking, urban-themed paint job.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a colorful, cartoon urban warehouse design and a smooth, glossy finish. The body features light blue, tan, and brown tones with a black muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black muzzle device and the narrow, elongated barrel opening, with the blue upper receiver visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full urban warehouse motif, the bullpup configuration, and the distinct color separation between the upper and lower receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the integrated magazine area and the rounded stock, with the tan grip and blue upper receiver visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same urban motif and structural details, with the trigger guard and grip clearly visible.
